svg.text: REST vs GraphQL API for data-intensive analytics dashboard
GraphQL eliminates over-fetching for dashboard widgets that need partial data.
Single endpoint reduces API surface, easier to evolve schema without versioning.
Risk: N+1 query problem requires DataLoader implementation overhead.
Acknowledging: partial-fetch benefit is valid for widget composition.
Counter: team has zero GraphQL production experience — DataLoader bugs
in N+1 paths caused 3 outages in 2023 for similar teams (sources attached).
REST + sparse fieldset param achieves 80% of the benefit, zero new risk.
CONSENSUS: partial data fetching is a real requirement; over-fetching must be solved.
UNRESOLVED: team capability with GraphQL resolver optimization.
FINAL_RECOMMENDATION: REST with sparse fieldset (?fields=) for v1.
GraphQL migration gate: unlock after team completes DataLoader training module.
✓ Consensus reached in 2 rounds · 5 LLM calls · Writing decision to shared_memory...
